g.text: UEORMS Full Activity Diagram (Project + Report Complete Coverage)
Open UEORMS Web or Mobile Client
Choose register, login, reset, or plan view
UC01 Enter company and admin details
Issue JWT with tenant and role claims
Load role permissions and dashboard context (UC14)
Verify OTP and set new password
UC15 View public plans and pricing metadata
Resolve user, tenant, and role context
Return 403 module not in active plan (R2)
UC06 Invite user and send invitation email
UC07 Accept invite and activate account
UC09 Manage roles, permissions, and assignments
UC11 Configure company setup and approval matrix
UC12 Manage branches and branch transfer operations
UC13 Manage system options and reference settings
UC22 List pending approvals and my requests
UC24 Reject workflow step with reason
UC26 Query audit logs by module and actor
UC29 Stream realtime events to clients
UC35 Clock in and clock out
UC40 Manage tasks and work reports
UC43 Create payroll cycles and run calculations
UC50 Approve or reject expense claims
UC51 Manage chart of accounts hierarchy
UC52 Create and update journal entries
UC53 Post or reverse journal entries
UC60 Approve or cancel stock movements
UC65 Review inventory and production stats
UC67 Manage leads and convert leads
UC68 Manage deals, pipelines, and stages
UC69 Manage CRM activities and reminders
UC70 Manage CRM attachments and communications
UC72 Convert quotation to sales order
UC76 Track order dispatch and delivery
UC77 Export and schedule sales analytics
UC82 Convert requisition to purchase order
UC90 Approve or reject AP bills
UC92 Generate aging and vendor statements
UC94 Manage milestones, resources, and budgets
UC95 Manage project members and capacity
UC99 View project dashboard and tasks
UC100 Manage asset categories and assets
UC103 Manage maintenance plans and execution
UC104 Calculate depreciation history and summary
UC105 Manage document and folder lifecycle
UC108 Review document activities and stats
UC112 Manage email templates and queue
UC113 Upload, access, and search files
UC114 Generate financial, HR, and inventory reports
UC116 Save and export report outputs
UC119 Export operational and ledger data
UC121 Monitor integration status and config
UC17 View billing metrics and event history
UC18 Preview, download, or resend invoices
Support fallback reads for dashboard, accounting,
Persist audit logs for critical actions (R16)
Broadcast realtime dashboard and module updates
Emit integration events for dependent modules
Return success or validation error response
Session active and API requests continue?
Receive billing webhooks from payment gateways
Asset overdue allocation scan and reminders
Attendance absent marking for no clock and no leave
Execute scheduled report generation and export
Authenticate ws token and tenant scope
Push chat, approval, stock, and dashboard updates
- Sources: backend/src/app.js + route files + report docx extract
- Additional mounted files covered: companyRoutes.js and missing-routes.js
- Use cases represented: UC01 to UC121
- Report requirement alignment: R1 to R18
